# produced from uv.lock by the uv export front-end:
#    uv export --format requirements-txt -o requirements.txt
# Wheels-only + hash-pinned, so `pip download --only-binary=:all: --require-hashes`
# succeeds and the offline assembly is pure. Same shape as python-sample so it hits
# the same warm Store wheelhouse.
